discrepancies.summary: Umbrella concept-DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19885550 was systematically cited and labeled 'concept DOI' across 5 LANDED bridge sessions (≥21 files); actual umbrella concept-DOI is 10.5281/zenodo.19885549 per Zenodo native version-listing UI sidebar (operator paste 2026-05-10 21:43:37 JST: 'Cite all versions? You can cite all versions by using the DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19885549. This DOI represents all versions, and will always resolve to the latest one.'). The mislabeled DOI 19885550 is actually the umbrella v1.0 version-DOI (lives within concept 19885549).
ground_truth_sources: Zenodo native version-listing UI sidebar (umbrella record; operator paste 2026-05-10 21:43:37 JST)
doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19885549 STEP 0.4 fetch 2026-05-11 → 'Published May 2, 2026 | Version 2.0' (concept-DOI resolves to latest version)
doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19885550 STEP 0.4 fetch 2026-05-11 → 'Published April 29, 2026 | Version 1.0' (v1.0 version-DOI)
siarc-relay-bridge/sessions/2026-05-02/STRATEGIC-PICTURE-REVISED/picture.md L160 + L1073 (early authoritative registry; cites 19885549 correctly)

wrong_cites_19885550_as_concept: siarc-relay-bridge/sessions/2026-05-09/T1-EXECUTOR-116-UMBRELLA-V21-M9-V0-DEPOSIT-133/ (7 files including umbrella_v21.tex + b_amendment.diff + discrepancy_log.json with inverted resolution heuristic + unexpected_finds.json + handoff.md + submission_log_item11_splice.diff + zenodo_v21_deposit_log.md)

The §1 Concept DOI cell and §5 step 1 preserved per anti-edit 4 (single-deliverable scope). §7 DOI correction note documents the correction. LANDED predecessors at slot 133/135/137/160/161 NOT modified per immutability protocol.

remediation.future_source_cleanup: Slot 133/135/137 tex-source files are pre-Zenodo source files; operator-side catch at deposit-time-paste is the recommended path (visit 19885549 instead of 19885550). Bake correction into next-version source files (umbrella v2.3 / PCF-2 v1.5) rather than retroactive amendment-overlay slots.
remediation.umbrella_v20_zenodo_description_body_typ: The v2.0 Zenodo record's own description body says 'v1 (April 2026, concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19885550) anchored the program' — this same typo propagated from the v2.0 source. Operator may want to fix the live Zenodo record description text OR carry forward as 'v1 (April 2026; v1.0 version-DOI 10.5281/zenodo.19885550 within concept 10.5281/zenodo.19885549)' in umbrella v3.0+.
